note: Single source of truth for rates published on /rates/. Edit here + regenerate the rates page. State pages still hardcode their own copies for now (SEO-safe cross-references); when they're due for a rate refresh, sync to these values.

products.name: DSCR Rental Loans
products.loanSize: $55K – $3M single-asset; portfolios of 2–10 properties on one loan
products.dscrMin: 1.0 (Below-1.0 lane available with reserves or rate buy-up)

products.name: Fix & Flip Loans
products.maxLTV: Up to 100% LTC for premier borrowers; 65–75% of ARV cap

products.name: New Construction Loans
products.maxLTV: 85% of land purchase + 85% of construction cost
products.closeTime: 10-day average once permits + plans are in

shared.pricingBasis: Priced off the 5-year Treasury; up-front quote is the rate you close at — no bait-and-switch
